positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a whimsical astronaut floating through a bioluminescent cosmic nebula. The style should be clean, retro-futuristic, and highly contrasting, suitable for screen printing on apparel. The astronaut is depicted in a stylized, sleek white suit, gently interacting with floating geometric planets and crystalline star formations. Color palette focuses on deep indigo blues, vibrant cyan accents, and popping pops of neon magenta and lime green for the nebulae and stars. The composition is centered, with strong negative space around the main figure, ensuring optimal print visibility. Graphic elements should have clean outlines and crisp edges. Concept: 'Cosmic Wanderer'.
